signals.headline: Congress Releases First List of 284 Candidates for West Bengal Polls | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Congress Releases First List of 284 Candidates for West Bengal Polls | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Congress announced its first list of 284 candidates, including Adhir Ranjan Chowdhury from Baharampur and Mausam Noor from Malatipur, planning to contest all 294 seats.[4] This clarifies opposition positioning and may influence markets betting on seat shares or anti-incumbent momentum.[4]

signals.headline: Deutsche Börse's $200M Kraken Investment | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Deutsche Börse's $200M Kraken Investment | YES | HIGH confidence**
Deutsche Börse made a landmark $200 million investment in Kraken, signaling that crypto infrastructure has reached institutional maturity and opening new channels for traditional finance capital inflow[1].

Bitcoin Price Consolidation Above $73,000 | YES | MEDIUM confidence**
